description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that triggers on push to the master branch for specific paths and on workflow dispatch with an optional limitarch input. Run a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the code, uses gh-describe to get the Git tag, sets up QEMU and Buildx, logs in to Docker Hub, and then builds the Docker image using a script in contrib/docker with the GIT_BRANCH, GIT_REVISION, and LIMITARCH environment variables.
